backend_url.title: Backend URL
backend_url.description: Bastio server endpoint (api.bastio.com for Cloud, customer's self-hosted bastio for OSS).

installation_token.title: Installation Token
installation_token.description: Bearer token identifying the org installation. Pushed by IT via MDM.

installation_secret.title: Installation Secret
installation_secret.description: Base64url-encoded HKDF root secret. Per-install HMAC keys are derived from this.

default_policy.title: Default policy
default_policy.description: Action to take per severity tier.

custom_keywords.title: Custom keywords
custom_keywords.description: Per-org keyword list flagged at low severity (e.g., internal codenames).

domain_overrides.title: Domain overrides
domain_overrides.description: Additional internal AI tool domains to track beyond the default public list.

override_enabled.title: Override allowed
override_enabled.description: Whether employees may bypass a high-severity block with a justification.

telemetry_endpoint.title: Telemetry endpoint path
telemetry_endpoint.description: Path on backend_url where governance events are POSTed.

tracking_mode.title: Tracking mode
tracking_mode.description: Which sends generate telemetry. 'policy' (default) only reports policy-relevant events; 'volume' also sends per-domain aggregate counts every 5 minutes; 'full' adds an `observed` event per benign send for forensic deployments.

redirect_target.title: Redirect target
redirect_target.description: Where to send employees when their prompt is blocked. Configurable per org.
